title: OTIS Benefits From Solid R&D Investments, Orders & Backlog
text: OTIS benefits from robust R&D investments and operational improvements, reflecting solid backlog and order volume.

title: Otis: The Stock Could Be Heading For The Top Floor
text: Otis became a publicly traded company in 2020 after spinning off from United Technologies. Since becoming a separate entity, management has been focused on growth with great success.
